name: Endur ASA
summary: End√É¬∫r ASA engages in the aquaculture, maritime, and energy businesses in Norway and internationally. The company offers maritime service, and technical ship maintenance and services; and produces integrated concrete feed and work barges for the aquaculture industry. It also engages in the maintenance, modification, installation, fabrication, and reconstruction of oil and gas installations for onshore and offshore. The company was formerly known as Bergen Group ASA and changed its name to End√É¬∫r ASA in February 2019. End√É¬∫r ASA was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.
